Announcements

Announcements

Public Holiday Announcement

28
						October

2025

Due to the Republic Day celebrations on October 29, the International Admissions Office, International Students Office (Mecidiyeköy and Tuzla Campuses), International Programs Office, and Erasmus Office will be closed on Tuesday, October 28, and Wednesday, October 29.

In case of an emergency, please contact us at

international@okan.edu.tr
